sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97883" key="sugkoru/fwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκορῠ´φ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συγκεφαλαίωσις</foreign>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
